getCurrentUser().notes: section-5 needs the local user's uid to determine which seat is 'me' (and therefore which seat shows the betting controls).

fourColorDeckPreference().notes: Persisted in /players/{uid}.preferences.four_color_deck (section-1 writes; section-5 reads). Section-5's card render uses this to select the suit-color CSS variable values.

notes: Decoupled: section-5 doesn't reach into Firebase Auth directly. The user preferences live under /players/{uid} which section-1 owns.
